record_types.name: Digicam_Configure

fields.name: Mode
fields.description: Mode enumeration from 1 to N //P, TV, AV, M, etc. (0 means ignore).

fields.name: Aperture
fields.description: F stop number x 10 //e.g. 28 means 2.8 (0 means ignore).

fields.name: Iso
fields.description:
ISO enumeration from 1 to N //e.g. 80, 100, 200, Etc (0 means
ignore).

fields.name: Exposure_Type
fields.description: Exposure type enumeration from 1 to N (0 means ignore).

fields.name: Command_Id
fields.description:
Command Identity (incremental loop: 0 to 255). //A command sent
multiple times will be executed or pooled just once.

fields.name: Engine_Cut_Off
fields.description:
Units: [ds]
Main engine cut-off time before camera trigger (0 means no cut-off).
